title: Fix severance section position in left pane

log.context: Fix severance section position in left pane

Done. The fix was a single-line change in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

- `rosterList` (the Active personas container) had `style="flex: 1"` — this caused it to expand and fill all remaining sidebar height, visually pushing the Severance section below the visible area.
- Changed it to `style="flex: 0 1 auto"`, matching the same pattern already used by the Sessions and Severance divs.

Now all three sections (Sessions, Active, Severance) stack tightly in the flex column in document orde...(truncated)
